creator: ek@purplehat.org
text:
Created attachment 253975
3.5 and bash completion update patch

An update to tmux is long overdue, for sure. I've been testing 3.5 for a bit now with no noticeable issues (it also finally fixed my previous problems with nvim inside tmux. Yikes!)

Attaching a new update patch for 3.5 that also updates the bash completion the port is using to the latest.

Poudriere build log can be found at: https://pkg.purplehat.org/data/fbsd_14-1_x64-HEAD/2024-10-02_22h32m01s/logs/tmux-3.5.log
